title: stachys recta f. angustifolia
intro: Stachys recta f. angustifolia, also known as Narrow-leaved Betony or Betonica angustifolia, is a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it a popular remedy for wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Stachys recta f. angustifolia include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive problems, and promoting wound healing, due to its high content of essential oils and antioxidants. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and respiratory problems.
